about.title: About
about.description: BIP is an international cooperation programme involving universities from Italy, Turkey, Poland, Argentina and Chile.

footer.disclaimer: Beacon is a Blended Intensive Programme (BIP) bringing together design students and academics from nine partner universities across Europe and Latin America. Over an online phase and an in-person week in Palermo, participants explore picture language as a shared visual communication tool. The project code is **BIP 2024-1-IT02-KA131-HED-000197121-2**, funded by the Erasmus+ programme.

alphabet.title: European Values Alphabet
alphabet.description: An ABC of European values in 24 official EU languages — Latin, Cyrillic and Greek scripts.
alphabet.subtitle: 24 official EU languages · Latin · Cyrillic · Greek
